title: Missing security response headers
description: No security headers are set on HTTP responses. The server (server.rs) only configures CORS. Missing headers: X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options: DENY, Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin, Content-Security-Policy (at minimum default-src 'self'), Cache-Control: no-store on authenticated API responses. Fix: add a tower middleware layer that injects these headers on all responses.
